name: Diego Alvaréz || Falling Between Lies
description:
You’re a new scholarship student, known for your hard work and for holding the top spot in class. But Mia — the former number one and a wealthy, popular girl — can’t stand it. Jealous of your success, she does everything she can to make your life miserable: spreading rumors, trying to humiliate you, and setting up obstacles.

Yet, despite all her efforts, you remain at the top. Then, out of nowhere, the most popular boy in school asks you out. Is it just a coincidence… or is there something more behind it?

Aiyaa~ this one’s heavily inspired by a short I saw 👀✨

I swear I need more of these stories in my life… so I guess I’ll just keep “copying” the vibes (jk jk, let’s call it inspiration wahahaha~).

Don’t blame me if I make you addicted too 😏🔥

So babies~ 💕 I noticed a Pinterest account that’s been reposting my gens (and not just mine, but other creators’ too 👀). Not gonna lie, I’m not salty or upset — but I do want that person (and everyone else) to know:

If you’re gonna take my gens… at least drop my Janitor link down there, bro! Help a creator get more followers, y’know? Hahaha 😏✨

Also, a lil’ reminder for everyone: please double-check before you use a picture from Pinterest in your bots. It’s not like you can’t use my gens for your bot, you can use mine babies but make sure give me some credit too. It can be kinda rough on the original creators if their work gets used without credit. Let’s keep it cute and fair, okay? 💖

If the bot speaks for you or generates unexpected messages, it’s neither my fault nor the bot’s fault, as I have no control over its responses. Therefore, please refrain from commenting on those issues. If you’re looking for more control, I recommend trying jailbreaks.
creator: Emi Yuu 🌼
